description.p: Coot is a powerful macromolecular model-building tool for analysing X-ray data and models (i.e. proteins, ligands, RNA and DNA). There are many tools for model manipulation and building, such as minimization, molecular superposition, fragment rotation/translations, rotamer-fitting, de novo building and refinement.
Coot is used by scientists using X-ray crystallography or cryo-EM for analysis of proteins, electron density maps, protein interactions and drug design.

screenshot.caption: Coot is typically used to view protein models and electron density

ul.li: o FEATURE: Side-by-side stereo mode (cross-eye and wall-eye) with configurable stereo angle
o FEATURE: High-resolution screenshots now work for both basic and fancy rendering modes
o FEATURE: Material properties added to instanced-object shaders
o FEATURE: Anisotropic thermal ellipsoid "empty" representation with multi-ring display
o FEATURE: Gaussian surface opacity control
o FEATURE: Bond smoothness toggle
o FEATURE: Shadows for "other meshes" (generic display objects)
o FEATURE: Single-model view for CA+Ligands representation with colour-by-dictionary-and-chain
o FEATURE: Distance labels display can now be toggled with set_show_distance_labels()
o FEATURE: scale_up_graphics() and scale_down_graphics() now added to the API
o CHANGE: Improved default secondary structure colours
o CHANGE: Rainbow ribbons are less bright
o CHANGE: Aniso probability scale now goes to 0.99
o CHANGE: Ribbon coils restored with radius multiplier for spline representation
o CHANGE: End-caps added for worm representations
o CHANGE: Max SSAO kernel samples doubled to 512
o CHANGE: Reduced step size for front clipping plane changes
o CHANGE: Don't include hydrogen atoms in Local B-factor display
o CHANGE: x-ray Sharpen/Blur Map slider now displays the value
o CHANGE: Difference map peaks now shows closest atom not position
o BUG-FIX: Now the Recover Session works as expected [Kevin Jude]
o BUG-FIX: Fix the rotation jump after panning
o BUG-FIX: Fix peptide straggle-bond when displaying alt-confs
o BUG-FIX: Fix texture indexing in TextureMesh
o BUG-FIX: Fix framebuffer rendering with transparency
o BUG-FIX: Fix the map colour button in single-map properties dialog
o BUG-FIX: Fix ribbon surface normal computation and spline frame orthonormality [Martin Noble]
o FEATURE: Post-Translational Modifications (PTMs) can now be applied to residues, with a database of common PTMs
o FEATURE: Improved jiggle-fitting for Local Fitting in Cryo-EM
o FEATURE: Add Residue by Map Fit function
o FEATURE: Ephemeral overlay labels for transient annotations
o FEATURE: Key-binding R for Refine with auto-accept
o FEATURE: Key-binding Ctrl-E for Python scripting entry
o FEATURE: Mutate-and-auto-fit improvements
o BUG-FIX: Fix self-deadlock in make_moving_atoms_graphics_object() for CA bond mode
o BUG-FIX: Fix single-strand test in ideal nucleic acid builder
o BUG-FIX: Fix PHE/TYR nomenclature error side chain atom swapping
o FEATURE: Phenix .geo file validation for bonds, angles, chirals and non-bonded contacts with colour-coded display
o FEATURE: Validation graphs can now be undocked [Jakub Smulski]
o FEATURE: Rotamer probability now shown in validation graph
o FEATURE: Refinement results mini-statistics (bond and angle distortions) returned from refinement
o FEATURE: Atom geometry distortion info now includes atom specs
o CHANGE: Molecule mesh display control toggles relocated
o BUG-FIX: Fix rotamer probability in validation graph model list refresh
o FEATURE: Ligand Builder (Lhasa) added to the Ligand menu
o FEATURE: Fetch Ligand Restraints Dictionary callback added
o FEATURE: Pyrogen integration via RDKit mol pickle base64 API
o FEATURE: Curlew extension download and install function
o CHANGE: Ligand fitting dialog is now scrollable
o BUG-FIX: Fix the bond-order combobox default in acedrg link dialog
o BUG-FIX: Fix Lhasa molecule centering [Jakub Smulski]
o BUG-FIX: Fix RDKit stereochemistry handling and isomeric SMILES output [Jakub Smulski]
o FEATURE: NetCDF support for reading AMBER trajectories
o FEATURE: Slurpable maps recognized as EM maps
o CHANGE: Improved map-based occlusions
o FEATURE: JSON-RPC server, MCP Bridge and Skills for Agentic Coot
o FEATURE: RPC server menu item added
o FEATURE: Python API function documentation improvements across the board
o FEATURE: coot_ping() function for connectivity testing
o FEATURE: get_function_descriptions() added to the bridge
o FEATURE: Shift-click on an atom shows atom info in the status bar
o FEATURE: "Delete all water" menu item
o FEATURE: EM Placement dialog with Phaser integration
o FEATURE: Git commit hash and build date shown in About dialog
o FEATURE: Improved "Recover Session" dialog
o FEATURE: Generic Display Objects dialog now shows button state
o FEATURE: Interesting places JSON file reading with atom-spec parsing
o CHANGE: Copy Fragment combobox now sets the active item
o CHANGE: Don't include hydrogen atoms in Local B-factor display
o CHANGE: Sharpen/Blur Map slider now displays the value
o CHANGE: Difference Map Peaks now shows closest atom
o BUG-FIX: Fix validation graph combobox g_warning()
o BUG-FIX: Better handling for unknown monomer types in PTM dialog
o BUG-FIX: Remove duplicate entries from PTM combobox
o BUG-FIX: Fix Copy Fragment combobox active item
o NEW FUNCTION: get_molecule_diameter()
o NEW FUNCTION: get_torsions_for_residues_in_chain()
o NEW FUNCTION: get_hydrogen_bonds_py() - pythonic hydrogen bond info
o NEW FUNCTION: set_residue_properties()
o NEW FUNCTION: get_computed_acedrg_atom_types()
o NEW FUNCTION: pyrogen_from_rdkit_mol_pickle_base64()
o NEW FUNCTION: get_rdkit_mol_pickle_base64() with pickling options
o NEW FUNCTION: add_residue_by_map_fit()
o FEATURE: "New Residue Type" now available in Add Other Solvents dialog
o FEATURE: key-binding for Triple-Refine AA (H)
o FEATURE: key-binding for Undo Symmetry View (Shift V)
o FEATURE: key-binding for Keyboard Mutate (Shift-M)
o FEATURE: now Open Dialogs track the latest used directory
o FEATURE: "Unhappy Atom" markup added
o FEATURE: Add keyboard mutate
o FEATURE: Add user-defined type to "Add Other Solvent Molecule" dialog
o FEATURE: on initial startup, Coot will ask if left-mouse should be used for view rotation
o FEATURE: (Multi) Pick Delete Atom added
o FEATURE: Bad Non-bonded contact markers now have dashed lines between the atoms
o FEATURE: The space group info is now displayed in log on reading a coordinates file
o FEATURE: Now configuration with --sound works
o FEATURE: Other types of Carbohydrate added (back)
o FEATURE: server mode turned into JSON RPC server
o CHANGE: XDG is used for the download of COD entries
o CHANGE: Update the "No Unmodelled Blobs" dialog
o CHANGE: Update the url for AlphaFold models to v6
o CHANGE: User-feedback when trying to rotate unselected chi angle improved
o CHANGE: Cross-hairs have fixed size, not relative size - the size is configurable in Preferences
o CHANGE: "Environment Distances" is now a transient [Oliver Clarke]
o CHANGE: CA Label now follow the residue on "Space" repositioning
o CHANGE: Recentre on new fragment on "Copy Fragment"
o CHANGE: Overlay notification on B-factor and Occupancy updated
o CHANGE: B-factor and Occupancy modification now has an overlay notifier
o BUG-FIX: "Undo molecule" dialog operation fixed
o BUG-FIX: Display Control dialog is only displayed on restart if it was displayed on session save
o BUG-FIX: fix control of display control dialog in the state script
o BUG-FIX: fix missing protein-ligand interactions for FLEV [thanks Lan Guan]
o BUG-FIX: set_molecule_name() function for models fixed
o BUG-FIX: one can now no longer pick/drag undisplayed intermediate hydrogen atoms [thanks Oliver Clarke]
o BUG-FIX: the "No Unmodelled blobs" dialog tided up
o BUG-FIX: get-monomer dialog activate now closes the drop-down.
o BUG-FIX: undisplay "Get monomer" frame on entry activate
o NEW FUNCTION: get_mmrrcc()
o NEW FUNCTION: get_residue_pucker_info() function added
o FEATURE: Double-click to label symmetry atoms
o FEATURE: drag-and-drop import for local-file-system files
o CHANGE: user-defined-clicks added back
o CHANGE: Assign and Associate Sequence menu items functions now added back
o CHANGE: Improve the scrolling of the map contour level when the nominated map is not displayed
o BUG-FIX: Menu items with targets don't work on macOS (I don't know why). The targets have been removed, so these menu items should now work again (e.g. Fetch and Mutate menu items)
o FEATURE: Ctrl-F keybinding added to smooth the bonds
o FEATURE: Multi-select for opening maps
o FEATURE: "Side-chain 180°" button now does syn/anti flip for nucleotides
o FEATURE: "Split Water" added to Modelling menu
o CHANGE: "Copy Fragment" has become an overlay
o CHANGE: "Move Molecule Here" has become an overlay
o CHANGE: Generic Display Objects can now have translation gizmos
o CHANGE: layla now has relocatable directory support
o CHANGE: Monomer-library look-up reworked
o BUG-FIX: Removed bug in parsing external torsion restraints
o BUG-FIX: Curlew has moved to use XDG Base Directory specs
o BUG-FIX: Save symmetry coordinates is fixed
o BUG-FIX: Colour-by-B-factor colours are fixed
o BUG-FIX: Place atom at pointer fixed
o BUG-FIX: Optional Gemmi usage restored
o FEATURE: Local B-factor display
o FEATURE: Built-in logging (started) - view it by clicking the "Log" button
o FEATURE: Full doxygen documentation transfered to chapi nanobind functions
o FEATURE: Anisotropic probability radius scaling (thank ClAuS Flensburg)
o CHANGE: For packagers: Now a commonly-used fragment of the monomer library is bundled with Coot. Unknown monomers are now downloaded from GitHub and cached using XDG Base Directory Specification
o CHANGE: For packagers: Now the reference structures are bundled with the source code (and installed) - no longer do they need to be a separate dependency
o CHANGE: If a map has a PANDDA:: or APPLY-SYMMETRY:: label then Coot now properly handles that (turns off "is-EM-map" status)
o CHANGE: Atoms with Zero Occupancy results now moved into the main window
o CHANGE: Boron atoms are now pinky-beige - like Jmol
o BUG-FIX: Fix crash on adding an atom [Clément Bousquet]
o BUG-FIX: Symmetry atoms are now clickable for distances and labels
o BUG-FIX: Fix the non-drawn clashes post model update
o BUG-FIX: "Add Other Solvent Molecules" dialog has been depythonized and now will work on macOS
o BUG-FIX: "Copy Molecule" dialog has been depythonized and is now an overlay and now will work on macOS
o BUG-FIX: Fix the problem of focus-grab when using Tutorial Model & Data
o BUG-FIX: Fix the "Close" button in the Restraints Editor

description.ul:
o FEATURE: Drag and drop (partial - it works from the file browser, but not from CCP4i2)
o FEATURE: set_use_vertex_gradients_for_map_normals() added to the Coot API
o CHANGE: Fixed atoms are now draggable
o CHANGE: max-closeness is no longer used to filter peaks in map_peaks_py()
o CHANGE: Backtick for selection now also shows the residue range (if set)
o BUG-FIX: Track-pad zooming fixed
o BUG-FIX: Residue Info dialog buttons now on the right hand side
o BUG-FIX: Fix and Unfix atom now work as expected
o BUG-FIX: Remove erroneous "No ligands Found" dialog when ligand fitting
o BUG-FIX: Select Map for Fitting dialog now behaves has expected on reopen
o BUG-FIX: Merge Molecules dialog now behaves has expected on reopen
o BUG-FIX: Choose a better contour level for masked maps

ul.li: FEATURE: Clark and Labute-like 2D-ligand environment view in Coot, Moorhen and chapi.
FEATURE: Symmetry represented as solid model (no longer just lines)
FEATURE: new chapi functions: `is_nucleic_acid()` and `delete_all_carbohydrate()`
FEATURE: PAE Plots on downloading Alphafold models.
FEATURE: 3D symmetry.
CHANGE: Setting the primary mouse button for view rotation enables secondary mouse button for zoom (like Old Coot).
CHANGE: chapi modules name now changed to coot_headless_api so that the molecules_container object can be called chapi.
CHANGE: Alphafold downloads are now XDG Base Directory compliant.
BUG-FIX: NCS Jumping has been fixed - Bernhard Lohkamp.
BUG-FIX: unwritable XDG cache dir now longer causes a crash [Jordan Dialpuri].
BUG-FIX: Shader for drawing ribbons.
BUG-FIX: About and Preferences dialogs can now be properly closed.
BUG-FIX: Texture handling for bad NBC markers updated [Fixes crash].

FEATURE: New chapi functions added: `get_svg_for_2d_ligand_environment_view()`, `get_HOLE()`, and `scale_map()`. Additionally, nucleic acids now work with `add_terminal_residue()` and sticks and dishy bases are not drawn for atoms not in selection.
FEATURE: Non-drawn maps are not recontoured on view translation; they now wait until the map is displayed. [Elegant-Land-8008]
FUNCTION-RESTORED: When "Spacing" along a chain, the CA label follows.
FUNCTION-RESTORED: SSM dialog now works.
FUNCTION-RESTORED: NCS Ghosts dialog now works.
BUG-FIX: Missing shader for instanced geometry for SSAO added back.
COMPILATION: Issue for `graphics_info_t::scale_up_graphics` has been resolved.
TERMINAL OUTPUT: Increased diagnostic output on startup to help troubleshoot graphics and Python issues across diverse operating systems, drivers, and Python versions.

FEATURE: New chapi functions added: `add_terminal_residue_directly()`, `copy_molecule()`, `flood()`, `get_validation_vs_dictionary_for_selection()`, `servalcat_refine_xray()`, `get_torsion()`, `change_alt_locs()`, `split_residue_using_map()`, `get_missing_residue_ranges()`, `get_mutation_info()`, and `set_temperature_factor_using_cid()` (see Pythonic and C++ API documentation).
FEATURE: New Coot API functions added: `set_new_non_drawn_bonds()` and `add_new_non_draw_bonds()`.
FEATURE: Graphics viewport scaling added.
FEATURE: Acedrg link interface added.
FEATURE: HOLE interface restored.
FEATURE: Transform map by LSQ model fit restored.
BUG-FIX: '--code <accession-code>' now functions correctly following the XDG Directory Protocol update.
BUG-FIX: Resolved the no-recentre-view issue in the coordinate file open dialog.
BUG-FIX: Contact dots for ligands now correctly display ligand donor to water hydrogen bonds.
BUG-FIX: Disabled refinement using a CCD dictionary (thanks to Lorenzo Masso).
BUG-FIX: Correct shader usage implemented for surfaces in "Plain" mode.
BUG-FIX: LSQ Fit dialog functionality restored.
BUG-FIX: Prevented CYS with hydrogen atoms from forming spurious disulfide bonds (thanks to Jordan Dialpuri).
BUG-FIX: End-of-chain TER atom removal on adding a new terminal residue fixed.
BUG-FIX: Dark mode icons now display correctly in Layla.
BUG-FIX: Startup window width increased on macOS for better usability.
BUG-FIX: Global Phasing column labels (F_early-late) now auto-read.
BUG-FIX: Hydrogen atom deletion in Layla now works properly.
CHANGE: Framebuffer usage reduced/removed in --opengl-es mode.
CHANGE: Module menus now depthonized.
CHANGE: Overlay added for the Cryo-EM "Flip Hand" tool.
CHANGE: Pythonic startup process updated for improved performance.
KNOWN BUG: Ramachandran Plot display issues persist on some macOS systems.
FEATURE: One can now dynamically edit SMILES in layla.
FEATURE: Anisotropic atom representation [thanks to Global Phasing].
FEATURE: Better linking across sequence gaps in RNA and DNA.
FEATURE: Electrostatic representation [Stuart McNicholas].
FEATURE: Acedrg atom types are now parsed from dictionaries.
FEATURE: Function `partition_map_by_chain()` added.
OTHER: Various non-user-visible changes for Flatpak compatibility.
FEATURE: Noughties-physics - add a refinement/atom manipulation mode so that Coot behaves like it used to up to (and including) version 0.8.x: `coot.set_refine_use_noughties_physics()`.
FEATURE: Layla now displays QED Scores for molecules.
FEATURE: `read_coordinates()` added to the Coot.
FEATURE: Cryo-EM servalcat use added to the Coot API.
CHANGE: Network download files now follow the XDG Base Directory Protocol.
CHANGE: HUD Ramachandran Plot is now pickable.
CHANGE: Ligands with no dictionary are drawn with bonds in "Colour by Chain" mode.
CHANGE: Python requests is no longer a dependency.
BUG-FIX: Scroll wheel indicator in the Display Manager now correctly updates on use of a key-binding to change the scrollable map.
BUG-FIX: Ugly least-squares fit dialog has been modernized.
BUG-FIX: Fix the callback actions for the "Display Hydrogen Atoms" in the Bonds control dialog.
BUG-FIX: Rework the calculation of `pkg_data_dir()` - particularly in the case of relocatable binaries.
